description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a global image node:latest and defines a cache for the node_modules directory. Add a build-project job in the default build stage that runs on the node:8 image and executes the following shell commands in order: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium; apt-get -yq install git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release". Configure this job to collect artifacts from the coverage/, doc/ and dist/ directories, set them to expire after one day, and capture test coverage using the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs on the global node:latest image, and runs the commands: ls -l; mkdir .public; mv coverage/ .public/coverage/; mv doc/ .public/doc/; mv .public public. Publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after ninety days, and configure the job to run only on the master branch.
